transcript:
CALLER: Hi. I want to know when Dr. Rekha Patel is available. She's a gynaecologist I believe.
AGENT: Hello! Could I confirm — you're asking specifically about Dr. Rekha Patel's availability and schedule?
CALLER: Yes. I've consulted her before and I'd prefer to continue with the same doctor.
AGENT: I completely understand that preference. However, specific named doctors' schedules — including days off, leaves, and clinic timings — aren't accessible to me from this line. This information needs to come from our front desk directly.
CALLER: Is she even available at this clinic currently?
AGENT: I genuinely don't want to confirm or deny without accurate information — her consulting schedule may have changed. Our reception staff will have the latest confirmed schedule. Let me connect you to them right now.
CALLER: Please do.
AGENT: Absolutely — let me connect you to our staff now. Please hold.
